rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Wmiexec.py Execution

rules.rule_text:
title: Wmiexec.py Execution
id: 2968dbf6-77ee-4932-b42b-b453d3ac8915
status: experimental
description: "This detection analytic looks for wmiprvse.exe spawn cmd.exe with the\
  \ following command line, \n`cmd.exe /Q /c ', ' 1 \\\\', ' 2 &1`. These strings\
  \ are specific to the execution of wmiexe.py, \nwhich allows a semi-interactive\
  \ shell used via WMI. Part of the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection \nReport.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/impacket/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.s0357
- attack.execution
- attack.t1047
- attack.lateral_movement
- attack.t1021
- attack.t1021.003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \wmiprvse.exe
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - 'cmd.exe /Q /c '
    - ' 1> \\'
    - ' 2>&1'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
